task.title: Deploy 5-agent news workflow into new group and run two cycles
task.goal: Create group 'news test' (or deterministic variant), provision 5 agents from openclaw-33 family (manager=33 + editor/worker-33/worker-xhs/tester subagents), deploy newsflow workflow and run two full cycles with distinct cycle evidence.
must_do: Create or select group slug news-test; if taken use deterministic variant and report actual slug.
Provision 5-agent topology from openclaw-33 family: manager=33 base, subagents editor/worker-33/worker-xhs/tester.
Deploy newsflow workflow per DeepFlow spec; do not downgrade to 3-role workflow.
Run two real cycles with distinct cycle ids and artifacts.
Capture evidence for cycle 1 and cycle 2 artifacts and message traces.
must_not_do: Do not substitute unrelated agents (e.g., neko/xhs) for required subagents.
Do not fake cycle 2 by copying cycle 1 artifacts.
Do not skip evidence collection for cycle identities.
acceptance: Group exists with required slug and 5-agent membership.
Cycle 1 and cycle 2 complete or a precise first blocker is reported.
Artifacts are attributable to each cycle.
task.notes: Use community server APIs; follow DeepFlow newsflow roles. Return JSON result with blocker if cannot proceed.
